value: Town beads broken: /gastown/repos/hq/.beads/dolt is empty (only .beads-credential-key, no Dolt data). Migration 0028_local_state_dolt_ignore.up.sql throws 'nothing to commit'. This breaks: gt mq submit, gt mail, gt escalate, gt nudge — all comms/MR routing through town beads. Workaround: rig beads at /gastown/repos/hq/gasdepot/mayor/rig/.beads work, and real issue data is at /gastown/repos/hq/.dolt-data/gasdepot (queryable via 'dolt --data-dir /gastown/repos/hq/.dolt-data sql'). Routes config (/gastown/repos/hq/.beads/routes.jsonl) maps 'ga-' → gasdepot/mayor/rig but that dolt is also empty. Fix needed: repair or re-init town beads dolt.
